query:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_centavos), 0)::bigint AS "facturado!",
               COUNT(*) AS "tickets!",
               COALESCE(SUM(descuento_centavos), 0)::bigint AS "descuentos!"
        FROM ventas.ventas
        WHERE estado = 'confirmada'
          AND (vendida_en AT TIME ZONE $3)::date BETWEEN $1 AND $2
